name: Experience.com
description:
What Experience.com Does?

Experience.com is a multi-location reputation management platform with various tools and services that help local businesses being found by local audiences. 

Source: Experience.com

Features

➡️ Offers tools to collect, analyze, and act on customer feedback.

➡️ Provides customizable surveys to gather feedback from customers at various touchpoints.

➡️ Analyzes customer sentiment from feedback data to understand overall satisfaction.

➡️ Manages online reviews and ratings across multiple platforms for reputation management.

➡️ Monitors social media channels for mentions and conversations about the brand.

➡️ Collects feedback from employees to improve internal processes and culture.

➡️ Generates real-time reports and dashboards for quick insights into customer sentiment.

➡️ Provides actionable insights and recommendations based on feedback analysis.

➡️ Integrates with CRM systems and other tools for seamless data sharing and management.

➡️ Offers customizable solutions to fit the specific needs of businesses.

Benefits

⭐️ Identifies areas for improvement to enhance overall customer experience.

⭐️ Manages online reviews and addresses customer concerns promptly.

⭐️ Builds trust and loyalty by listening to and acting on customer feedback.

⭐️ Engages employees in the feedback process, leading to improved morale and productivity.

⭐️ Provides valuable insights for making informed business decisions.

⭐️ Addresses customer issues in real-time to prevent escalation.

⭐️ Helps businesses stay ahead of competitors by understanding and meeting customer needs.

⭐️ Streamlines feedback collection and analysis processes for efficiency.

⭐️ Maintains a positive brand image by responding to feedback and resolving issues effectively.

⭐️ Demonstrates the return on investment through improved customer satisfaction and loyalty.

‍

Pros: 

✅Easy to understand and use the platform 

✅Seamless integrations 

Cons: 

❌Can be difficult to get in touch with customer support at times 

❌No citation builder and store locator

‍

Offers custom pricing options
what_people_say:
“It automates client satifaction, which we wouldn't be aware of otherwise, and allows us to not only respond to issues when voiced (which we're unlikely to be aware of otherwise), but also address internally in an effort for constant improvement. It also provides an opporunity to share client testimonials on social media from the 1st person perspective of the client, where else/how else can you gather this without cherry picking (i.e. advertising). Trust factor seems higher, as not every review is 100% positive, and that's OK too. They're also innovating, adding lead gen to their tool box through referral capture of past clients via email campaigns. Smart!”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
